name: @nlqdb/docs
description: nlqdb user-facing documentation site (docs.nlqdb.com) — Astro Starlight on Cloudflare Workers Static Assets.

scripts.gen: bun run scripts/gen-sdk.ts && bun run scripts/gen-examples.ts && bun run scripts/gen-cli.ts && bun run scripts/check-error-codes.ts
scripts.deploy: bun run gen && astro build && wrangler deploy
